title: Ender Eye Overhaul
description: Overhauls the Eye of Ender recipe with modded Ender Pearl support and a challenging new set of Vanilla ingredients
body:
_**Echo Shards** to guide the Eye’s flight. **Wind Charges** to lift it to its height._  
_**Blaze Powder** to spark the portal’s gleam. **Prismarine** to anchor the starry seam._  

---

Extend your world or modpack’s progression by making The End an exciting challenge to reach. To face the Ender Dragon, players must explore **Ancient Cities**, **Trial Chambers**, **Nether Fortresses**, and **Ocean Monuments** to gather the ingredients needed to craft Eyes of Ender, find the Stronghold, and unlock the End Portal.

This recipe is compatible with any mod which uses the ```c:ender_pearls``` tag.

  [AdamMystery7](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1eld4wv/my_idea_of_how_to_extend_minecrafts_progression/) | Original Concept, Recipe  
  [Vor-teu-chung](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1eld4wv/comment/lgr4xt1/) | Original Concept, Lore  
  [Progressive Ender Eyes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/progressive-eyes) | Original Implementation, Shapeless Crafting Recipe
</details>
